approval.note: Use an isolated Commonworld worktree. Before every nontrivial merge require complete published diff, head/tree/diff-bound self-review, green CI, review resolution and exact live Pages readback.

title: Deliver a real geographic and hybrid Commons vertical slice
goal: Make the globe an information body using real sourced geographic, digital and hybrid CommonProject identities without creating a second catalog truth.

acceptance.assertion: Seed-only validation is separated from the scalable production catalog contract.
The public slice includes sourced exact, extent, approximate, hidden and hybrid cases plus at least one evidenced relation.
Static map representations derive from CommonProject records and preserve one CommonProject.id.
Location line and zoom stages expose appropriate Commons information from planet to focus.
Globe, digital sphere and Text select the same identity and never invent hidden or digital coordinates.
